app.name: Stock management
app.description: Article and stock management back office

dashboard.title: Welcome to stock management
dashboard.description: This interface is the back-office entry point. Article management will be connected to the API as endpoints become available.

articles.title: Articles
articles.description: Search, sort and view registered articles.
articles.addArticleUnavailable: The add form will be enabled when its API integration is implemented.
articles.name: Name
articles.apiUnavailable: The API does not yet provide a documented endpoint for listing articles.

validation.reference: The reference must contain exactly 13 digits.
validation.name: The name is required.
validation.price: The price excluding tax must be zero or positive.
validation.saleMode: Select at least one sale mode.

articleDetails.title: Article details
articleDetails.noBuckets: No stock lot for this article.
articleDetails.noMovements: No stock movement for this article.
articleDetails.inactiveWarning: This article is inactive. Editing and stock actions are no longer available.

articleEdit.title: Edit article
articleEdit.refreshError: The article was updated, but its details could not be refreshed.

validation.name: The name is required.
validation.price: The price excluding tax must be zero or positive.
validation.saleMode: Select at least one sale mode.

articleDeactivate.title: Deactivate article
articleDeactivate.message: Do you really want to deactivate this article?
articleDeactivate.details: The article will no longer appear in active results, but its lot and movement history will be preserved.

supply.title: Add a supply
supply.refreshError: The supply was added, but the article details could not be refreshed.

validation.quantity: The quantity must be a strictly positive integer.
validation.reference: The lot reference must contain exactly 13 digits after ref-lot-.

inventory.title: Take inventory
inventory.searchMinimum: Enter at least 9 digits to start searching.
inventory.noExistingBuckets: There is no existing lot for this article. You can add a newly counted lot.
inventory.refreshError: The inventory was recorded, but the article details could not be refreshed.

validation.noSelection: Select at least one lot or add a newly counted lot.
validation.duplicateBucket: This lot is already included in the inventory.
validation.countedQuantity: Each counted quantity must be an integer greater than or equal to zero.
validation.reference: Each new reference must contain exactly 13 digits after ref-lot-.
validation.duplicateReference: A new lot reference already exists or was entered more than once.
validation.newQuantity: A new lot quantity must be a strictly positive integer.
validation.expirationDate: The expiration date is required for each new food lot.

sale.title: Record a sale
sale.refreshError: The sale was recorded, but the article details could not be refreshed.

validation.quantity: The quantity must be a strictly positive integer.

apiAvailability.title: Waiting for the API
apiAvailability.description: The server is not available yet. A new attempt is made automatically every 2 seconds.

errors.notFoundDescription: The requested page does not exist or has been moved.

reference.invalid: The reference must contain exactly 13 digits.
reference.already_exists: An article with reference {{reference}} already exists.

sale_modes.required: At least one sale mode is required for a food article.
sale_modes.forbidden: Sale modes must not be provided for a non-food article.

page_number.invalid: The page number must be at least {{minimumPageNumber}}.

page_size.invalid: The page size must be between {{minimumPageSize}} and {{maximumPageSize}}.

reference.invalid: The lot reference must use ref-lot- followed by 13 digits.

search.invalid: Enter between {{minimumDigits}} and {{maximumDigits}} digits to search for a lot reference.

expiration_date.required_for_food: The expiration date is required for a food lot.
expiration_date.forbidden_for_non_food: An expiration date must not be provided for a non-food lot.

packaging.forbidden_for_food: Packaging must not be provided for a food lot.
packaging.required_for_non_food: Packaging is required for a non-food lot.

quantity.must_be_non_negative: Quantity must be greater than or equal to zero.
quantity.must_be_positive: Quantity must be greater than zero.

vat_rate.must_be_non_negative: The VAT rate cannot be negative.
vat_rate.invalid: The VAT rate must be between 0 and 1.

stock.insufficient: Insufficient stock. Requested quantity: {{requestedQuantity}}, available quantity: {{availableQuantity}}.

sale_mode.not_allowed: This sale mode is not allowed for this article.
sale_mode.required: A sale mode is required for a food article.
sale_mode.forbidden: A sale mode must not be provided for a non-food article.

adjustment.required: At least one inventory adjustment is required.

existing_buckets.required: The existing lot list is required.

new_buckets.required: The new lot list is required.

selection.required: Select at least one lot to inventory.

existing_bucket.duplicate: An existing lot can only be inventoried once.

bucket.not_in_article: The selected lot does not belong to this article.

new_reference.duplicate: A new lot reference can only be added once.
